description: Promotes content with an image, title, description and CTA button. Used on landing pages, campaign pages and homepages.
variationHints: Always include a variation with image on the left
Include a variation with image on the right
Include a text-only variation without an image
Include a variation with a CTA button
Include a variation without a CTA for editorial use
edgeCaseHints: Test with a very long title exceeding 60 characters to check truncation
Test with missing fileReference — component must not break
Test with all optional fields empty — only required fields filled
Test with a very long description to check text overflow

fieldNotes.fileReference: Use the sampleImage path from assetPaths above
fieldNotes.jcr:title: Use an adventurous, inspiring headline
fieldNotes.jcr:description: One sentence max — keep it punchy and active
fieldNotes.ctaText: Use one of the ctaExamples values
fieldNotes.titleType: Use h2 for most variations, h1 only for hero placement
fieldNotes.imageLinkHidden: Set to true when you do not want the image to be clickable
